---
title: ""
toc: false
website:
  title: "Gerry Ryan"
  site-url: "https://geryan.github.io"
  open-graph: true
  twitter-card: true
  image: "images/dsc_0594-1680_wide_bw.png"
---

::: hero-lead
I'm **Gerry Ryan**, a researcher using modelling methods to support decision making in public health and conservation science.
:::

## Current work {.home-h2}

I'm modelling mosquito distributions to inform malaria control with the [Vector Atlas](https://vectoratlas.icipe.org){target="_blank"}, alongside other problems in infectious disease.

## Expertise {.home-h2}

- Population dynamics of wildlife and infectious diseases
- Species distribution modelling and dynamics
- Risk assessment and decision theory

## Roles {.home-h2}

::: roles

Senior Research Officer

:   [Infectious Disease Ecology and Modelling Team](https://www.thekids.org.au/our-research/brain-and-behaviour/child-health-analytics-research-program/infectious-disease-ecology-and-modelling/){target="_blank"}, The Kids Research Institute Australia *(formerly the Telethon Kids Institute)*

Honorary Research Fellow

:   [Infectious Disease Dynamics Unit](https://mspgh.unimelb.edu.au/research-groups/centre-for-epidemiology-and-biostatistics-research/Infectious-Disease-Dynamics){target="_blank"}, Melbourne School of Global and Population Health, University of Melbourne

Adjunct Research Fellow

:   UWA Medical Centre for Child Health Research, University of Western Australia
:::

## My work {.home-h2}

::: profile-links
[Publications](publications.qmd) [R Packages](software.qmd)
:::

## Elsewhere {.home-h2}

::: profile-links
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com.au/citations?user=pU7MMEoAAAAJ&hl=en){target="_blank"} [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0183-7630){target="_blank"} [GitHub](https://github.com/geryan){target="_blank"} [Email](mailto:gerry.ryan@thekids.org.au){.email}
:::
